## Checklist

- [ ] Article follows the [format guide](CONTRIBUTING.md#article-format)
- [ ] No tutorial-style prose
- [ ] All code examples have language tags and are valid
- [ ] Gotchas section exists
- [ ] No course names, instructor names, or book titles
- [ ] Article is 50-500 lines
- [ ] File name is kebab-case.md
- [ ] Placed in correct domain folder
- [ ] Wiki-links use `[[Article Title]]` syntax
